name: DistancingMode
summary: Defines how offset and similar operations should work.

enum_values.name: Undefined
enum_values.summary: Nothing is defined. This serves as null.

enum_values.name: Linear
enum_values.summary: When geometrically possible, offsets with a linear distance.

enum_values.name: LinearFromEnd
enum_values.summary: When geometrically possible and an opposite side exists, offsets with a linear distance from that side.

enum_values.name: Ratio
enum_values.summary: When geometrically possible, uses a percentage of respective neighbours to compute offsets.

enum_values.name: RatioFromEnd
enum_values.summary: When geometrically possible and an opposite side exists, uses a percentage of respective neighbours to compute offsets.
